3004110.name: Remission
3004110.description:
Remission

Due to a Radioactive accident at the Hospital, Cancer cells have mutated into human form
The mayor has asked DR. Rose to stop them
It is up to You to help her find the cure to save the city, and save us all
Dive into a world of danger, strategy, and storytelling, where every choice matters


Features:

Face off against unique enemy types, each with different stats
Intense combat with a diverse range of Weapon types
Dynamic Spawning Enemy System
Quests
Use Chemo shots to regain health
Vaulting Mechanics
Mutant AI Behavior System
3rd Person Character
Various in-game objects to find
A large immersive city environment for your adventures
Highly optimized
Realistic movement and combat actions
Engaging bonus system rewards performance with points, offering progression
Enemies bring diversity and challenge to every encounter
Navigate with a comprehensive HUD that provides crucial information at a glance
Monitor health, Armor, stamina, and flashlight usage, ensuring you're always prepared for the challenges ahead
Save/Load the game seamlessly for a continuous adventure
Tweak with various Video, Audio, and Graphics options to achieve your desired settings
Manage your items seamlessly with an intuitive inventory system
Music and SFX
